memoryArtifacts.headline: MOORE FAMILY HISTORY FOLLOWS:
memoryArtifacts.description:
MOORE FAMILY

4 July 2016


1.JOHN MORRES (1415-1460)
ALICE BIRMINGHAM (1410-1472)

JOHN MORRES was born about 1415 in England to unknown parents. He married Alice Birmingham.

John Morres died about …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Cordray Morris於1481年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾時，他的父親Charles Edward Moore26歲，母親Ellen Huet23歲。他於1506年與Alice Wynninge在英國英格蘭波克夏結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1556年7月7日在他的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Cordray Morris于1481年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾时，他的父亲Charles Edward Moore26岁，母亲Ellen Huet23岁。他于1506年与Alice Wynninge在英国英格兰波克夏结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1556年7月7日在他的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾。

nameMeanings.name: Morris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Mauritz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Armin, Frieda, Helmut, Kurt, Reinhold, Wolfgang.
German and Dutch: from the personal name Mauritz, from Latin Mauritius (see Morris ).

variants.name: Mauricio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Carlos, Mario, Roberto, Lilia, Luis, Adela, Andres, Antero, Cipriano.  Portuguese Manoel.
Portuguese (Maurício) and Spanish: from the personal name Maurício (Portuguese), Mauricio (Spanish), derived from the Latin name Mauritius (see Morris ).

variants.name: Maurice
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Armand, Denys, Gabrielle, Antoine, Benoit, Camille, Cecile, Francois, Gaston, Germain.
French, English, Welsh, Scottish, and Irish: from the Old French personal name Maurice, Latin Mauritius (see Morris ).

variants.name: McMorris
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muiris, a patronymic from a Gaelicized form of Morris . In some cases this is a Gaelicized form of Fitzmaurice .
Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muirgheasa ‘son of Muirgheas’, a Gaelic personal name meaning ‘sea valor’ or ‘sea choice’. Compare Morrissey .

variants.name: Morici
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Gasper, Aldo, Angelo, Annamarie, Elvio, Giuseppe, Sal, Santo, Vito.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of a variant of the personal name Maurice (see Morris ).
Hungarian: patronymic from the personal name Móric, Hungarian form of Morris .

variants.name: Moris
meanings: English: variant of   Morris  .

French, Luxembourgish, Flemish, Walloon, North German, and Dutch: from a vernacular form of the French personal name Maurice (see Morris ). In North America, the surname Moris may also be an altered form of French Maurice .
Americanized form of German   Moritz  .

variants.name: Merrick
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Meuric, the Middle Welsh form of Maurice (see Morris ).
Irish: borrowed from Welsh. In Ireland, when this is not the Welsh name, it might be adopted for Irish Ó Mearadhaigh, see Merry 2.

variants.name: Maurizio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carlo, Marcello, Marco, Mario, Fernando, Matteo, Natale, Sal, Valentino, Vito.
Italian: from the personal name Maurizio, from Latin Mauritius (see Morris 1).

variants.name: Morehouse
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from any of the many places called Moorhouse in Yorkshire or Durham (from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + hūs ‘house’). In some cases the surname may have become Morris . This name is also established in Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Cordray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French coer de roi ‘(having the) heart of a king’. This surname is now extinct in Britain.

variants.name: Cordry
meanings: English: variant of   Cordray  .

variants.name: Cordrey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Cordray . Alternatively, possibly derived from Old French corderie ‘ropery, rope-walk’, taken to mean a worker at a ropery.

variants.name: Cordery
meanings: English: variant of   Cordray  .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Cordray Morris was born in 1481, in Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Charles Edward Moore, was 26 and his mother, Ellen Huet, was 23. He married Alice Wynninge in 1506, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 7 July 1556, in his hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Cordray Morris est né en 1481, à Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Charles Edward Moore, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Ellen Huet, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Alice Wynninge en 1506, à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 7 juillet 1556, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Cordray Morris 1481 in Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Charles Edward Moore 26 und seine Mutter Ellen Huet 23. Er hat 1506 in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Wynninge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Juli 1556 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Cordray Morris è nato il nel 1481 nel Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Charles Edward Moore, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Huet, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Alice Wynninge nel 1506, nel Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 7 luglio 1556, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Cordray Morris(이)가 1481년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Charles Edward Moore(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Huet(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1506년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 Alice Wynninge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1556년 7월 7일 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Cordray Morris nasceu em 1481, em Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Charles Edward Moore, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Huet, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Wynninge em 1506, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de julho de 1556, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Cordray Morris родился в 1481 г. в местности веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Charles Edward Moore было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Huet, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Wynninge в 1506 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 7 июля 1556 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Cordray Morris nació en 1481, en Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Charles Edward Moore, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Ellen Huet, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Alice Wynninge en 1506, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 7 de julio de 1556, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
